insight: Immolite provides marginally more value than Tarsier in vacuum due to cost-efficiency, but actual gameplay value depends heavily on the ability to defend against breach damage from slower output.
author: shadourow
context: Casual comparison of two attackers in an Iso Kronus context.

insight: Buying Phages into Animus (instead of Tarsier-only econ) and then transitioning to Iceblade Golem beats early Endotherm Kit rush convincingly.
author: sano712
context: Specific line discussion against Endotherm Kit opening.

insight: In the Base + Corpus Ling + Shadowfang set, the optimal P1 line is not to buy Shadowfang, and instead P1 should play DD/DD/DDA/TTD, which loses to P2's more efficient DD/DD/DAA/TDB line.
author: jamberine
context: Analysis of a specific set matchup.
